# Spinzo - Premium Laundry & Dry Cleaning Service in Bangalore

> Spinzo is a fast, premium, tech-enabled laundry and dry cleaning delivery service operating exclusively in South Bangalore, India. 30-minute doorstep pickup and delivery within hours.

## Core Services
- **Wash & Fold**: ₹85/kg. Daily wear washed, dried, and folded. 6-12 hour turnaround. Free pickup and delivery.
- **Wash & Iron**: ₹140/kg. Professional washing + steam ironing. 24-48 hour turnaround.
- **Steam Ironing**: ₹18/piece. Professional steam pressing. Min 5 pieces.
- **Blanket Wash**: ₹299 (single) / ₹399 (double). Deep cleaning for blankets and quilts.
- **Dry Cleaning**: ₹79-150/piece. Specialized care for suits, silk, wool, and delicate fabrics.

## Key Features
- 30-minute doorstep pickup guarantee
- Delivery within 6 hours (Wash & Fold)
- Free pickup and delivery in all service areas
- Weight-based transparent pricing, no hidden charges
- 100% safety guarantee — compensation up to 2x service value
- Separate washing for each customer, 100% hygiene
- Available 9 AM to 10 PM, 7 days a week
- App available on iOS and Android, plus web app at spinzo.in

## Location Pages (Bangalore, South)
- [Jayanagar](https://spinzonow.com/locations/jayanagar): Laundry service in Jayanagar
- [JP Nagar](https://spinzonow.com/locations/jp-nagar): Laundry service in JP Nagar
- [BTM Layout](https://spinzonow.com/locations/btm-layout): Laundry service in BTM Layout
- [Koramangala](https://spinzonow.com/locations/koramangala): Laundry service in Koramangala
- [HSR Layout](https://spinzonow.com/locations/hsr-layout): Laundry service in HSR Layout
- [Kudlu](https://spinzonow.com/locations/kudlu): Laundry service in Kudlu / HSR Extension
- [Bommanahalli](https://spinzonow.com/locations/bommanahalli): Laundry service in Bommanahalli
- [Wilson Garden](https://spinzonow.com/locations/wilson-garden): Laundry service in Wilson Garden
- [Shanti Nagar](https://spinzonow.com/locations/shanti-nagar): Laundry service in Shanti Nagar
- [Adugodi](https://spinzonow.com/locations/adugodi): Laundry service in Adugodi
- [SG Palya](https://spinzonow.com/locations/sg-palya): Laundry service in SG Palya
- [Tavarekere](https://spinzonow.com/locations/tavarekere): Laundry service in Tavarekere
- [Madiwala](https://spinzonow.com/locations/madiwala): Laundry service in Madiwala
- [S R Layout](https://spinzonow.com/locations/s-r-layout): Laundry service in S R Layout
